pet_notes: Reference-based Codex digital pet: compact chibi yellow rounded face and body; silver-white center-parted short bob hair made of four chunky curtain-like panels; very large white circular eyes with black pupils; red oval cheek patches; small orange flat duckbill-like beak; black oversized turtleneck collar and black sleeveless upper body; white loose pants with short black boots; one orange basketball held/touched on the pet left side; tiny square chest badge rendered as an abstract two-pixel glyph, no readable text. Preserve the cute hand-drawn mascot identity but simplify into pixel-art-adjacent Codex pet style.
style_notes: Small digital pet sprite, chunky readable silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, crisp pixel-like edges, no gradients, no shadows, no scenery, no text, no watermark, clean flat chroma-key background for removal, generous padding, animation identity consistency is more important than illustration detail.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
